---
title: "Publications"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-location: right
---

<div class="page">

# Publications

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=P_LBnTbIAy8C&hl=en) · [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-2335-8470) · [ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Rodrigo-Aguayo)

*Highlighted name indicates first or corresponding authorship.*

---

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
import yaml

with open("data/publications.yml") as f:
    all_pubs = yaml.safe_load(f)

published = [p for p in all_pubs if "in review" not in p.get("journal", "").lower()]
in_review = [p for p in all_pubs if "in review" in p.get("journal", "").lower()]

published.sort(key=lambda p: (-p["year"], p["id"]))

for pub in published:
    authors = []
    for a in pub["authors"]:
        name = a["name"]
        if a.get("highlight"):
            name = f"**{name}**"
        authors.append(name)

    last = authors.pop()
    author_str = ", ".join(authors) + " and " + last

    doi = pub.get("doi", "")
    title = pub["title"]
    if doi:
        title = f"[{title}](https://doi.org/{doi})"

    year = pub["year"]
    journal = pub["journal"]

    print(f"- {author_str} ({year}). {title}. *{journal}*.")

    tags = pub.get("tags", [])
    if tags:
        pills = " ".join(
            f'<span class="tag-pill">{t}</span>' for t in tags
        )
        print(f"  {pills}")

    extras = []
    if pub.get("code_url"):
        extras.append(f"[Code]({pub['code_url']})")
    if pub.get("pdf_url"):
        extras.append(f"[PDF]({pub['pdf_url']})")
    if extras:
        print(f'  <span class="pub-links">{" · ".join(extras)}</span>')

    print()

if in_review:
    print("---")
    print()
    print("## In Review")
    print()
    for pub in in_review:
        authors = []
        for a in pub["authors"]:
            name = a["name"]
            if a.get("highlight"):
                name = f"**{name}**"
            authors.append(name)

        last = authors.pop()
        author_str = ", ".join(authors) + " and " + last

        title = pub["title"]
        doi = pub.get("doi", "")
        if doi:
            title = f"[{title}](https://doi.org/{doi})"

        journal = pub["journal"]
        year = pub["year"]
        print(f"- {author_str} ({year}). {title}. *{journal}*.")
        print()
```

</div>
